meta.pageDescription: WCAG 2.1/2.2 Angular component library ka showcase

table.loading: Table data load ho raha hai…
table.sortAscending: {{column}} ke hisaab se sort karein, ascending
table.sortDescending: {{column}} ke hisaab se sort karein, descending

hero.subtitle: 8 WCAG 2.1/2.2 AA-compliant components — ARIA, keyboard navigation, screen reader ke liye ready.

button.title: Button
button.description: 5 variants, 3 sizes, loading aur disabled states — sabme aria-busy, aria-disabled, aur 44 px touch targets hain.
button.note: Disabled buttons HTML ke disabled attribute ki jagah aria-disabled use karte hain, taaki wo tab order mein rahein aur screen reader unhe announce kare.

input.title: Input / Form Field
input.description: Explicit <label>, aria-describedby ke through hint text, aur validation fail hone par live-region error announcements.

email.label: Email Address
email.hint: Hum aapka email kabhi share nahi karenge

password.label: Password
password.hint: Ek number aur special character zaroor daalein

input.note: Errors role="alert" + aria-live="assertive" use karte hain, taaki blur hote hi screen reader beech mein aakar unhe turant announce kare.

errors.minlength: Kam se kam {{length}} characters hone chahiye.
errors.formHasErrors: Form mein errors hain. Please highlighted fields correct karein.
errors.fixFormErrors: Submit karne se pehle form ke errors theek karein.

modal.title: Modal / Dialog
modal.description: Focus trap, Escape se close, close karne par focus restoration, aria-modal, aria-labelledby, aria-describedby.
modal.note: Tab / Shift+Tab sirf dialog ke andar hi cycle karte hain. Close karne par focus wapas trigger karne wale button pe chala jaata hai — WCAG 2.4.3.

table.title: Data Table
table.description: Sortable columns par aria-sort, row selection ke liye aria-selected, aria-multiselectable, selection count ke liye live status.
table.sortedAnnouncement: {{column}} ke hisaab se sort kiya gaya, {{direction}}

tabs.title: Tabs
tabs.description: WAI-ARIA Tabs pattern — arrow keys se navigate karein, aria-selected, role="tabpanel", disabled tabs skip ho jaate hain.

overview.label: Overview
overview.paragraph1: Overview panel. Tabs ke beech move karne ke liye arrow keys dabayein. Panel content mein focus le jaane ke liye Tab dabayein.
overview.paragraph2: Saare tab triggers role="tab" use karte hain, aur panels role="tabpanel" ke saath aria-labelledby use karte hain.

wcagCriteria.label: WCAG Criteria
wcagCriteria.paragraph: Isme 2.1.1 Keyboard, 1.3.1 Info & Relationships, 4.1.2 Name/Role/Value, 2.4.7 Focus Visible cover hote hain.

disabled.label: Disabled
disabled.paragraph: Ye content accessible nahi hai kyunki tab disabled hai.

tabs.note: Arrow use karte waqt disabled tabs skip ho jaate hain. Sirf active tab mein tabindex="0" hota hai; inactive tabs tabindex="-1" use karte hain.

accordion.title: Accordion
accordion.description: aria-expanded, role="region", animated panels, triggers ke beech arrow key navigation.

wcag.title: WCAG kya hai?
wcag.content: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) W3C dwara develop ki gayi hain aur ye define karti hain ki disabled logon ke liye web content ko kaise zyada accessible banaya jaaye. WCAG 2.1 aur 2.2 mein POUR principles cover hote hain.

keyboard.title: Keyboard accessibility
keyboard.content: Saare interactive elements sirf keyboard se operate hone chahiye. Users kabhi bhi kisi component mein keyboard exit ke bina fasne nahi chahiye.

screenReader.title: Screen reader support
screenReader.content: Screen readers semantic HTML aur ARIA attributes par depend karte hain. Har component VoiceOver (macOS/iOS) aur NVDA (Windows) ke saath test kiya gaya hai.

contrast.title: Colour contrast requirements
contrast.content: WCAG 1.4.3 ke hisaab se normal text ke liye ≥4.5:1 contrast zaroori hai. Is library ke saare tokens is ratio ko meet ya exceed karte hain.

accordion.note: Har trigger aria-expanded + aria-controls use karta hai. Panels role="region" + aria-labelledby use karte hain. Arrow keys triggers ke beech move karti hain; disabled items skip ho jaate hain.

dropdown.title: Dropdown Menu
dropdown.description: WAI-ARIA Menu Button pattern — role="menu", aria-haspopup, arrow key navigation, Escape se close.

exportItems.csv: CSV Ke Roop Mein Export Karein
exportItems.json: JSON Ke Roop Mein Export Karein
exportItems.pdf: PDF Ke Roop Mein Export Karein

dropdown.note: Escape menu close karke focus trigger pe wapas laata hai. Disabled items mein aria-disabled hota hai aur wo keyboard navigation mein skip ho jaate hain.

toast.title: Toast / Notification
toast.description: info/success/warning ke liye role="status" (polite); errors ke liye role="alert" (assertive). Error toasts persistent hote hain aur kabhi auto-dismiss nahi hote.
toast.note: Error toasts tab tak rehte hain jab tak manually dismiss na kiya jaaye (WCAG 2.2.1). Close button 44×44 px ka hai, jisme descriptive aria-label hai. Type icon + label se convey hota hai — kabhi sirf colour se nahi (1.4.1).

messages.error: Kuch gadbad ho gayi — please phir se try karein.
messages.warning: Aapka session 5 minute mein expire ho jaayega.
messages.info: App ka naya version available hai.

info.title: Accessibility Principles
info.intro: Ye library saare chaar WCAG 2.1 POUR principles cover karti hai:

operable.desc: Poora keyboard access, koi trap nahi, focus management

understandable.desc: Clear labels, error identification, predictable UI

robust.desc: Valid HTML, ARIA, real screen readers ke saath test kiya gaya

confirmDelete.title: Record Delete Karein
confirmDelete.body: Kya aap sach mein is record ko delete karna chahte hain? Ye action wapas nahi liya ja sakta.

fullscreen.title: Fullscreen Dialog
fullscreen.paragraph1: Poora viewport — focus abhi bhi trap hai aur Escape abhi bhi close karta hai.
fullscreen.paragraph2: Complex workflows ya mobile devices par onboarding flows ke liye useful hai.
